articles.title: No OTP, No Escape - Delhi Traffic Police Close This Ultimate Challan Loophole
articles.description: Delhi Traffic Police has introduced mandatory on-the-spot OTP verification for traffic violations, preventing evasion through fake phone numbers. Officers now require verbal code confirmation before issuing tickets.

articles.title: Vedanta shares extend winning streak to 4th day, hit 52-week high
articles.description: Vedanta shares hit a 52-week high of Rs 336 on the BSE in early Thursday trade, surging as much as 4% in early trade. The stock extended the optimism from the previous session, where it settled nearly 6% higher at Rs 323.10 apiece.

articles.title: IT Stocks Extend Decline For Fourth Straight Session Amid AI, Growth Concerns
articles.description: The continued declines in the tech shares has pushed the Nifty IT Index more than 40% below its all-time high reached in December 2024.

articles.title: Oklahoma man to be executed for killing ex-girlfriend, her 7-month-old daughter
articles.description: Raymond Johnson, 52, was scheduled to receive a lethal injection at the Oklahoma State Penitentiary.

articles.title: Bengaluru Techies To Pay For Office Parking Now? New Proposal To Fix ORR Traffic Problem
articles.description: Employees of offices along Bengaluru's ORR corridor could be asked to pay for parking inside the tech parks if a new proposal by Bengaluru Traffic Police moves forward

articles.title: Despite Q4 net profit crash, Cipla shares rise 11% in two days: Factors behind the rally
articles.description: Cipla share price today: Cipla shares rose 11% in two sessions from Rs 1292 on May 12 to Rs 1432 in the current session. In today's session, the stock surged 8% intra day. Market cap of the firm rose to Rs 1.14 lakh crore.

articles.title: Despite Q4 profit crash, Cipla shares rise 11% in two sessions: Factors behind the rally

articles.title: UP braces for fresh storms: IMD issues rain warnings for 38 districts; Lucknow, Kanpur on orange alert
Drinking 2 to 3 cups of coffee or tea daily can lower dementia risk by 35%, study finds
articles.description: Moderate consumption of caffeinated coffee or tea can help reduce the risk of dementia, particularly in people under the age of 75, claims a new study. Researchers say 2 to 3 cups a day offers the strongest protection, while excessive caffeine showed no added benefit.

articles.title: Adani Enterprises jumps 7%, hits 52-week high; stock up 52% from March low
articles.description: Adani Enterprises stock hit a 52-week high of ₹2,665 and quoted 48 per cent higher against its rights issue price of ₹1,800 per share.

articles.title: UK to spend $1.35 billion on new howitzers for the British Army
articles.description: Britain will spend one billion pounds on seventy-two remote-controlled howitzers. This purchase modernizes the army and fills a war-fighting capability gap. Deliveries of the RCH 155 vehicles are expected from 2028. The contract supports over 500 jobs in the United Kingdom. The new artillery systems can fire at long distances and move at high speeds.

articles.title: 'Prempaatta' first look unveiled: Joemon Jyothir leads youthful campus romance; Set during an NSS camp
articles.description: Renowned director Aamir Pallikkal, known for his celebrated films, makes a grand announcement with the reveal of the first-look poster for his new youthful romantic drama, 'Prempatta'. Set against the lively backdrop of an NSS camp, the film delves into the dynamics of college friendships and the excitement of first love, featuring Joemon Jyothir in a pivotal role.

articles.title: HBSE 10th Result 2026 Live: BSEH Haryana Board class 10 results today @bseh.org.in
articles.description: Students who appeared for the Haryana Board secondary examinations can access their provisional scorecards online through the official website: bseh.org.in.

articles.title: ‘Atrocious’: SC stays HC’s order restraining TVK MLA from taking part in TN assembly
articles.description: The Supreme Court stayed a Madras High Court order preventing TVK MLA-elect Sreenivasa Sethupathi from participating in the Tamil Nadu Assembly.

articles.title: Over 30 people lose lives as rain, storm batter Uttar Pradesh; government announces compensation
articles.description: Authorities said rescue and restoration efforts were hampered in parts of the district after mobile connectivity was disrupted during the storm.

articles.title: US-Iran War News Live Updates: US Wants China To Play Active Role In Ending Iran War, Says Marco Rubio Ahead Of Trump-Xi Summit
articles.description: US-Iran War News Live Updates: US President Donald Trump is set to meet Chinese President Xi Jinping today in a high-stakes summit between the two countries.

articles.title: Tiger Woods' private jet lands in Florida from Zurich- Is his 'intense' rehab finally over?
articles.description: Tiger Woods has reportedly returned to Florida after spending around 40 days at a rehabilitation facility in Zurich following his DUI arrest and rollover crash in April. While his private jet’s arrival sparked optimism about his recovery, the focus has quickly shifted back to the legal case surrounding the incident. Prosecutors recently gained access to Woods’ prescription drug records, adding another layer to an already complicated situation. Woods has pleaded not guilty and remains away from competition as scrutiny continues both on and off the golf course.

articles.title: Scrap NEET, allow states to fill medical seats based on Class 12 marks, CM Vijay writes to Centre
articles.description: Following the NEET-UG 2026 cancellation due to paper leak allegations, Tamil Nadu Chief Minister C Joseph Vijay urged the Union government to scrap NEET. He advocated for state-level admissions based on Class 12 marks for MBBS, BDS, and AYUSH seats, citing the exam's flaws and its disadvantage to rural and government school students.

articles.title: Ludhiana: Road-carpeting delay hitting biz, dust causing health issues, say locals
articles.description: Even though the pipes have been laid, the road hasn’t been black topped yet, which stirs up sand due to heavy traffic on the road, leading to air pollution

articles.title: Tripura govt implements 50% WFH rule for employees following PM's appeal
articles.description: According to the memorandum, all Heads of Department (HoDs) have been directed to ensure that only 50 per cent of Group C and Group D employees attend office daily

articles.title: Gadkari opts for bus travel, cuts convoy size by 50%
articles.description: Nagpur: Union minister for road transport and highways Nitin Gadkari has decided to travel by bus during his May 14-15 visit to Pune, Satara and Solap.

articles.title: Maha govt halves ministers’ convoys
articles.description: Nagpur: Maharashtra govt on Wednesday ordered immediate reduction in the number of vehicles in the convoys of chief minister Devendra Fadnavis and all.

articles.title: Wanted Munir gang sharpshooter killed in Meerut encounter
articles.description: According to an STF press note, the encounter took place near a closed factory on Alipur Road under Lohia Nagar police station limits after teams received specific intelligence about his movement and an alleged plan to execute another murder in Meerut.

articles.title: Tripura govt orders fuel conservation, 50% staff to WFH on alternate weeks
articles.description: The Tripura government has mandated 50% of Group C and D staff to work from home on alternate weeks. The move follows PM Modi's appeal to conserve fuel and is part of new austerity measures to reduce government expenditure amid the West Asia crisis.

articles.title: India successfully extradites terror accused Iqbal Singh from Portugal
articles.description: India has successfully extradited Iqbal Singh alias Shera from Portugal. Accused of drug trafficking and terror financing, he will now face trial in India. The Patiala House Court has granted a two-day transit remand to the NIA.

articles.title: New York tornado warning: Syracuse sees thunderstorms move in; Jefferson, Oswego counties on alert
articles.description: A tornado warning was sounded for South central Jefferson County and North central Oswego County in New York, and photos showed dark clouds over Syracuse.

articles.title: CBSE transforms Class 12 evaluation with on-screen marking system
articles.description: Under this system, examiners can evaluate Class 12 answer books from any location in the country or abroad without physically transporting papers to centralised evaluation centres.

articles.title: Rowell Road residents see some relief after months of mosquito misery
articles.description: Experts say the Culex mosquito behind the outbreak poses limited public health risk, but residents should still eliminate stagnant water to cut breeding habitats.

articles.title: Why Singapore’s fuel supply holds steady but not prices, and when cost pressures may ease
articles.description: The global chokepoint in the Strait of Hormuz is having a ripple effect on everyday people and everyday life — from drivers to school bus operators, from air travel to grocery shopping. CNA’s Talking Point dives into the rising fuel prices.

articles.title: Cachar youth held for post against CM Himanta
articles.description: In a recent incident, a young man from Sonai in Cachar district was taken into custody in Guwahati for posting derogatory remarks about Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma. The post, which surfaced on Saturday, spread rapidly on social media and sparked considerable unrest in the Sonai community.

articles.title: Why India just slapped a 15% tariff on gold and why it probably won't work
articles.description: India has raised gold and silver import tariffs to 15% as rising bullion prices and Iran war-linked oil pressures strain the current account and forex reserves.

articles.title: Kitchen Sponge: Is it smelly? Time to replace it now! Experts warn hygiene risk
articles.description: The kitchen sponge is one of the most used items in your kitchen for washing dishes, but constant exposure to food particles and moisture makes it a breeding ground for germs. Look for signs like bad smell, stains, or wear to know when to replace it.

articles.title: CREDAI shifts annual convention from Amsterdam to India
articles.description: In a show of solidarity with Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s call to reduce non-essential foreign travel and conserve foreign exchange, Realtors' apex body CREDAI on Wednesday announced it is shifting its flagship annual convention, NATCON 2026, from Amsterdam to an Indian city.

articles.title: Russia Says Ties With India 'Impossible To Destroy', Promises Uninterrupted Energy Supply
articles.description: Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov assured that India's interests in Russian energy supplies "will not be affected" amid what he described as "unfair competition."

articles.description: Airport Modernisation: Government greenlights Nagpur Airport's upgrade via PPP, promising enhanced infrastructure and services.
